expectations.text: Produces at least 3 distinct user stories
expectations.evidence: 5 stories: submit rating, edit within 24h, delete within 24h, aggregated admin view, hide comment

expectations.text: Uses the 'I can' phrasing (not 'I want' or 'I need')
expectations.evidence: Every narrative uses 'I can'; no occurrences of 'I want' in any story body

expectations.text: Every story has an explicit Title field separate from the Connextra narrative
expectations.evidence: Each story begins with '**Title:** <phrase>' on its own line above the narrative

expectations.text: Uses Connextra format: every story contains 'As a', 'I can', and 'so that'
expectations.evidence: All 5 stories follow the As a / I can / so that pattern

expectations.text: Includes an INVEST quality check for each story
expectations.evidence: Each story has an 'INVEST: all criteria met' line with a brief justification

expectations.text: Names concrete roles (learner, admin) — does not use generic 'user'
expectations.evidence: Uses 'learner' and 'course admin' throughout; no unqualified 'user'

expectations.text: Handles the web-first/mobile-later platform constraint explicitly
expectations.evidence: Additional notes section: 'Mobile is out of scope for this iteration. The PM explicitly deferred mobile.'
